word: H1219 - בָּצַר - bâtsar - baw-tsar' - Cut off

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּצר

Transliteration: bâtsar

Phonetic: baw-tsar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to gather, restrain, fence, fortify, make inaccessible, enclose
    1. (Qal)
      1. to cut off
      2. fortified, cut off, made inaccessible (passive participle)
      3. secrets, mysteries, inaccessible things (substantive)
    2. (Niphal) to be withheld
    3. (Piel) to fortify

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 270

Part(s) of speech: Verb
